name: python3-userpath
title: python3-userpath
summary: tool for adding locations to the user PATH - Python3 library
description:
tool for adding locations to the user PATH - Python3 library
userpath is a command-line tool and Python library
to add custom locations to user PATH.
Only user-specific PATH is changed,
avoiding the need for elevated privileges.
.
This package provides the userpath library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-userpath because tool for adding locations to the user PATH - Python3 library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-userpath as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-userpath with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-userpath --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
